issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling for tool failures or network errors.
The skill contains extensive explanatory text that may be considered verbose for a concise skill file.
The skill is specific to LangGraph and does not support other AI agent frameworks.
The calculate tool uses eval, which can execute arbitrary code.

scenarios.name: Build a customer-support ReAct agent with tools and persistent multi-turn memory
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a State TypedDict with Annotated[list, add_messages], wires a conditional edge from agent to ToolNode and back, compiles with MemorySaver and invokes with configurable.thread_id for per-user memory; baseline writes a generic while-loop agent without StateGraph, ToolNode, or thread_id checkpointing.

scenarios.name: Multi-agent research-write-review pipeline with cycle limited to 3 revisions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines ResearchState TypedDict with sources Annotated[list, add], adds nodes research/write/review/revise/publish, uses add_conditional_edges('review', should_revise, ...) with revision_count<3 guard cycling back to revise; baseline produces a linear pipeline without StateGraph cycles or add-reducer accumulation.
